title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StudyIQ Education:
StudyIQ Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education!
